item.title: Trump to forge ahead with immigration crackdown driven by top aide Stephen Miller
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 6 - U.S. President Donald Trump is expected to forge ahead with his aggressive immigration crackdown driven by top aide Stephen Miller and a new homeland secretary nominee who shares Trump's hardline view, current and former U.S. officials and lawmakers said.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Israel backing Iranian Kurdish plans to seize Iran border areas, sources say
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
JERUSALEM, March 6 - Israel has been bombing parts of western Iran to support Iranian Kurdish militias who hope to exploit the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran to seize towns near the frontier, according to three sources familiar with Israel's talks with the factions.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Baby who died in France had formula with ‘abnormal’ toxin levels, say lawyers
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Several manufacturers have issued recalls of infant formula that may be contaminated with cereulide.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: US and Israel attacking Iran at ‘record pace’, war monitor says
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Airwars says first days of US-Israeli Iran strikes 'hit significantly more targets than any campaign in recent decades'.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Hezbollah saw new war with Israel as inevitable and rearmed for months, sources say
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BEIRUT, March 5 - Lebanese armed group Hezbollah spent months restocking its arsenal of rockets and drones, using support from Iran and its own weapons factories to prepare for a new war with Israel, six sources familiar with the group's preparations said.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Germany's Merz warns against spread of war in Middle East
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MUNICH, March 6 - German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said on Friday Berlin was working with partners to find an approach to end the fighting with Iran as he warned against allowing the country to fall into chaos as the war widens across the Middle East.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: White House says US well on way towards controlling Iran’s airspace
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Washington says it expects achievable US objectives to be completed in four to six weeks.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Has Donald Trump failed to sell the Iran war to the world?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Some of Washington's allies have been critical and will not join the conflict.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Israel extending ‘Gaza playbook’ to Lebanon, charity warns
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Medical Aid for Palestinians accuses Israel of 'deliberately terrorising civilian populations' across Lebanon.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Germany pulls further troops out of Middle East
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BERLIN, March 6 - Germany has pulled additional Bundeswehr troops out of the Middle East, a military spokesman told Reuters on Friday, the seventh day of a U.S.–Israeli war on Iran that has convulsed the region.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Russia is providing Iran with intelligence to target US forces, Washington Post reports
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
It includes the locations of US warships and aircraft in the Middle East.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: UN official says 100,000 Lebanese are in shelters after unprecedented Israeli warnings
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BEIRUT, March 6 - The number of displaced people in Lebanon is expected to rapidly increase after unprecedented Israeli evacuation orders covering large parts of the country, with about 100,000 already cramming shelters, a senior U.N. official said on Friday.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Israeli military says unintentionally struck UN agency truck in Gaza
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
TEL AVIV, March 6 - Israel's military said on Friday that a \"firing component\" launched by its navy unintentionally struck a fuel truck belonging to a United Nations agency in Gaza the previous day, an incident that prompted the agency to publicly call for a full investigation.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Iran shares video of Tehran primary school after attack
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
A school in Tehran has been struck in US-Israeli attacks, according to Iranian Ministry of Foreign Affairs spokesperson.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: US job market stalls, unemployment rate rises before Fed decision
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The healthcare sector was hit the hardest , while tariff-exposed sectors remained stagnant .
Matched: economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Overseas votes in Denmark election may not arrive in time due to Middle East turmoil, government says
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
STOCKHOLM, March 6 - Denmark's government said on Friday that the ongoing turmoil in the Middle East may prevent some overseas votes in the country's March 24 general election from arriving in time to be counted.
Matched: election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump demands Iran’s ‘unconditional surrender’ as war upends global markets
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Iran’s president has cited mediation efforts by some countries to end the war.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘No deal with Iran except unconditional surrender,’ Trump says
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US president stakes out maximalist war aims as conflict wreaks havoc across the region amid rising death toll.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Missile fire hinders Middle East rescue flights as airspace edges open
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
US-Israel war with Iran cancels flights, stranding passengers as airlines scramble and fuel prices surge.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Human rights court orders reparations for forced sterilisation case in Peru
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Inter-American Court of Human Rights says Peru must pay family of woman who died as a result of forced sterilisation.
Matched: court(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Swiss expect to purchase 30 F-35 jets after cost increases
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
ZURICH, March 6 - Switzerland now expects to purchase around 30 Lockheed Martin F-35A Lightning II fighter jets, six fewer than initially projected, because of cost increases in the order, the government said on Friday. In December, Switzerland said it would no longer buy 36 of the jets as planned, and Defence Minister Martin Pfister said rising costs meant the government was requesting an additional credit worth 394 million Swiss francs ($505 million) from parliament.
Matched: parliament(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Croatia to re-launch mandatory military service after 17 years
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
KARLOVAC, Croatia March 6 - Croatia is set to resume mandatory military service for the first time in 17 years as part of the European Union member's broader strategy to address security concerns in Europe and the Western Balkans.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: German military imposes general filming ban to curb social media risks
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BERLIN, March 6 - Germany's military has banned staff from filming and photography at all its sites since late February over concerns that sensitive information could be visible on social media, a defence ministry spokesperson said on Friday.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Chinese hackers hide malware in Windows and Google Drive to hit targets
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), cybersecurity(+3)
